critique: Strong dark-mode aesthetic with well-chosen accent colours and clear visual hierarchy. The gradient hero heading and card hover animations add polish. Responsiveness is good — the nav collapses on mobile and grids reflow correctly — though the logo row could use smaller font-size on very narrow viewports. Pricing cards are complete and the featured state is clearly differentiated. Code is clean with consistent custom-property usage; a minor improvement would be consolidating the repeated border-radius values into a variable.
